extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked solo 4km from summit finish for his second stage win while PINOT Thibaut distanced BERNAL Egan and ALAPHILIPPE Julian in GC battle, yellow jersey barely surviving with 27-second loss.
tactical_patterns: PINOT Thibaut attacked elite group 4km from summit, dropped BERNAL Egan who cracked attempting to follow pace changes.
ALAPHILIPPE Julian defended yellow without teammates in final kilometers, measuring effort instead of chasing bonus seconds aggressively.
THOMAS Geraint paced steady tempo with POELS Wout rather than responding to accelerations, regaining ALAPHILIPPE when Frenchman cracked.
LANDA Mikel surged from deep in peloton to bonus second place, showing superior late-climb acceleration reserves.
Team INEOS split response between THOMAS and BERNAL attacks revealed prioritization uncertainty between two GC threats.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: second solo mountain stage win demonstrates repeatable late-climb acceleration pattern superior to breakaway companions
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: dropped BERNAL Egan with 4km attack, moved to 4th overall showing sustained high-mountain superiority
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: cracked following PINOT acceleration 4km from summit, lost time despite attempting aggressive chase
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: in serious trouble without teammates but survived with only 27-second loss through disciplined tempo management
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: recovered from initial distancing to limit losses at 1:22, superior pacing discipline over reactionary efforts
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: surged from deep position to bonus seconds, exceptional late-climb reserves suggest underestimated climbing form
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: finished with lead group at 1:02, consistent high-mountain performance pattern continuing
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: finished 3:40 down representing significant collapse from initial breakaway position
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: negative: dropped to 10th overall with major time loss, confirming fading GC form
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: finished with elite chase group showing sustained high-altitude climbing improvement
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: from breakaway, finished 1:02 down demonstrating young climber capacity in multi-mountain stage
